response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development in industrial automation, secure coding per IEC 62443, or hands-on work with message brokers, multi-threaded systems, or industrial protocols — core requirements for the role. Their recent work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with minimal evidence of C++ or embedded systems in the last 9 years.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse domains.
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring.
Extensive background in event-driven systems and distributed architectures.
concerns: No recent C++ or STL work in industrial automation context.
Lacks demonstrable experience with IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity standards.
No exposure to MQTT, REST in IoT contexts, or industrial protocols like OPC UA or Modbus.
